历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 55; in 2022, approximately 55; in 2025, approximately 52 for physics category; rankings have been stable between 51-55 over the past five years with minimal fluctuation; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 52; enrollment plan for physics category in Yunnan: 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 31 in 2025, 35 in 2026; 2026 sees an increase of about 12.9% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition. History category enrollment plan: 2 each year from 2021 to 2026, remaining stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (1st from 2021 to 2026), making it a top national institution with an extremely high level. 4. [Reputation Heat] In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving general public opinion on school management, campus safety, dormitories, and cafeterias; no major enrollment anomalies or discontinuation signals; Douyin heat ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting very high application attention; Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Mechanics (A+), Architecture (A+), Civil Engineering (A+), Electrical Engineering (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), etc., with over 10 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating top national academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other advantageous major categories of Tsinghua continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance exam is approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), significantly intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment; the university has a wide distribution of enrollment across provinces, with a relatively small proportion in Yunnan, but rankings are extremely high, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings (51-55), the approximately 12.9% expansion in physics category enrollment in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 32% increase in total candidates in the province (intensifying competition), the somewhat negative reputation without major impact, and the high Douyin heat reflecting sustained high attention, various factors offset each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 52, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, predicting a minimum ranking of approximately 56 for physics category, with a range of 50-62; for history category, the minimum ranking is approximately 51, with a range of 50-62.

Candidates within the predicted range (50-62) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 50) can prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Clinical Medicine; candidates near the upper bound (e.g., around 60) should consider Tier 2 majors first and ensure Tier 3 safety. History category only enrolls 2 students, with a predicted ranking of approximately 51, making competition extremely intense; candidates within the range of 45-57 are advised to apply cautiously.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 54th; in 2022, approximately 48th; in 2025, for history category, approximately 51st. Over the past five years, the ranking has remained stable between 51st and 54th, with minimal fluctuation. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 51st. The university's enrollment plan for history category in Yunnan Province: from 2021 to 2026, it remains at 2 students, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked 1st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many consecutive years (2021-2026 all 1st), making it a top-tier national institution. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general public opinion on school management, campus safety, canteens, and dormitories, with no major abnormal admissions or discontinuation signals. Douyin heat ranking: 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting very high application attention. Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines, including Law (A+), Marxist Theory (A+), Business Administration (A+), and other liberal arts-related disciplines with top strength, strongly attracting liberal arts/history category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature are relatively popular and recommended. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province is approximately 377,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), significantly intensifying competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. The university has a wide distribution of enrollment across provinces nationwide, with only 2 students in Yunnan's history category, ranking extremely high, with limited influence from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings (51st-54th), unchanged enrollment plan for history category in 2026, a 32% increase in provincial candidates (intensifying competition), slightly negative reputation but no major impact, and high Douyin heat reflecting sustained attention. Based on the 2025 baseline of 51st, the competition effect from candidate growth is more pronounced due to unchanged enrollment plan, but Tsinghua's history category only admits 2 students, with rankings near the ceiling and minimal room for change. The predicted minimum ranking for history category is approximately 48th, with a range of 42nd to 54th.
